SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: EMERGENCY RELIEF AWARD FOR ARTISTS - DUE TO THE COVID-19 PANDEMIC MANY PROGRAMS WERE CURTAILED. EBF AWARDED $2,500 TO 40 MAINE ARTISTS SELECTED THROUGH AN OPEN JURIED PROCESS
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: RESIDENCY PROGRAM - PROVIDED A RESIDENCY PROGRAM FOR ARTISTS. THE AWARDEES CHOSEN THROUGH AN OPEN COMPETITIVE PROCESS. RECIEVE FREE STUDIO SPACE AND A STIPEND FOR LIVING EXPENSES
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: FELLOWSHIP PROGRAM - PROVIDED A FELLOWSHIP GRANT OF $25,000 TO AN AWARDEE CHOSEN THROUGH AN OPEN JURIED PROCESS. THE AWARD INCLUDES SOLO EXHIBITION AND A PUBLICATION.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: COMPOSER AWARD - PROVIDED A COMPOSER AWARD OF $20,000 THROUGH AN OPEN COMPETIVE JURIED PROCESS. THE AWARD INCLUDES A NEW FULL LENGTH WORK PLAYED BY AN ORCHESTRA AND RECORED.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: MUST BE SUBMITTED ELECTRONICALLY THROUGH SUMITTABLE.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: RESIDENCY MARCH & APRIL, FELLOWSHIP NOVEMBER, COMPOSER SEPTEMBER, OTHERS DECEMBER
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: 18 YEARS OR OLDER AND NOT ATTENDING A SCHOOL OR UNIVERSITY
